reviews.review_description: This bundle feels like a full VR adventure park. Each map offers unique environments and challenges that keep things exciting. I love switching between climbing, grappling, and gliding across huge structures. The height sensation is incredibly immersive. With so many challenges included, it provides hours of thrilling gameplay and exploration.

This bundle keeps things exciting with lots of movement options 🧗‍♂️🪂 You can climb massive towers, glide across maps, and explore huge environments . Every level feels different and fun  The freedom to move around makes it a really enjoyable VR adventure!

The bundle is an incredible VR experience. the map are huge and the sense of height feels amazing. I love switching between climbing skyscrapers, grappling across buildings,and gliding through the air. 💯 recommended.!
It looks terrible, plays terribly, runs terribly. Has no control options whatsoever, forced snap turning. I could fill a whole list with everything wrong with it. Don't waste your money or time.

developer_response.body: The game has 11 maps, and extra interiors, some are basic but many are very polished and best quality possible for Quest 3 for the size of the maps! What looks terrible to you? It has 121 experiences for 8.99 euros, that's  0.074 euros per experience! In other games you get only one or few experiences for this price. Understand it is a massive game, some of the experiences may have some bugs we are not aware of yet, but we are aware of some major ones and are working on them to fix them soon. Write us on ultrafungames.io@gmail.com if you encounter any bugs! Snap turning is best for anti-motion sickness but you can also turn in reality, however we will introduce new options.

reviews.review_description: It has many maps and experiences, totally worth it! You won't find such high quality and so many anywhere else!

The goal of this game is simple: get as high as you can (well, you also need to reach save points —by any means necessary. Whether it's scaling walls barehanded, swinging across gaps with a grapple, or blasting upward with a jetpack, each climbing method is unlocked through 10 dedicated levels, giving you hours of gameplay.

The mechanics are precise and engaging—climbing a natural building feels totally different from tackling a color-coded climbing wall. This attention to detail keeps the experience fresh and rewarding. The fact that it’s still in early access is exciting too, as the studio is already releasing updates and refining environments.

My personal favourites are climbing with bare hands, using the grapple, and, of course, soaring with the jetpack. This game brings back the thrilling sensation of vertical VR exploration that "Walk the Plank" once delivered—but less polished textures but far more depth and replayability.

Highly recommended if you’re into climbing challenges, immersive vertical gameplay, or just love testing your limits in VR.

A fun game packed with challenges from walking planks and climbing to grappling hooks across an impressive variety of levels.

The games in active Developement and already noticed a few changes since launch.

Graphics aren't the best, and there's a little pop-in in the distance, but it's acceptable when maps are large and open to explore.

Everything moves really smoothly and most impressive of all, there was no motion sickness even when swinging around like Spiderman

Don’t look down, when you are climbing those buildings. 

If you like Richie’s plank, you have to try this one.

A lot of different challenges. Check it out.
This is the first climbing game I have tried and really like it a lot. There are many challenges to make it through, so looks like I shall be putting quite a bit of time into this one!!
